title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: kmod-kvdo bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for kmod-kvdo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The kmod-kvdo packages provide the kernel module for Virtual Data Optimizer (VDO), which is a block virtualization technology that enables you to create compressed and deduplicated pools of block storage. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): kmod-kvdo module fails to load on RHEL 9.6 - no support for 5.14.0-570. kernel* (JIRA:RHEL-107188)

full_text:
An update for kmod-kvdo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The kmod-kvdo packages provide the kernel module for Virtual Data Optimizer (VDO), which is a block virtualization technology that enables you to create compressed and deduplicated pools of block storage. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): kmod-kvdo module fails to load on RHEL 9.6 - no support for 5.14.0-570. kernel* (JIRA:RHEL-107188)
